name: Baked Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pork and beans, then place them in an oven-proof bowl.
2. Chop the onion and apples, and add them to the beans along with the bar-b-que sauce, brown sugar, and raisins.
3. Mix everything together and arrange the bacon strips on top of the mixture.
4. Cover the bowl and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 to 1 1/2 hours.
